query:
-- installment schedule
SELECT i.period, i.amount, i.due_date
FROM installments i
JOIN contracts c ON c.external_id = i.contract_external_id AND c.section = i.section
WHERE c.contract_no = 'CT0225-KBI001-9274-01'
ORDER BY i.period;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute 
-- installment schedule
SELECT i.period, i.amount, i.due_date
FROM installments i
JOIN contracts c ON c.external_id = i.contract_external_id AND c.section = i.section
WHERE c.contract_no = 'CT0225-KBI001-9274-01'
ORDER BY i.period;
